note: The canonical trivial proof. Kernel-accepted by `trivial`.
Reflexivity of equality under a binder.
Natural-number addition identity (left zero), by rfl in Lean core.
Right zero identity. Used as a transfer probe across the commutativity family.

proposition: ∀ (a b : Prop), a ∧ b → b ∧ a
proof_text: intros a b ⟨ha, hb⟩; exact ⟨hb, ha⟩
note: Conjunction commutativity — a one-step rewrite target.
